result.summary: Set PostHero min-height to min(700px, 100vh) and align content to the bottom. CSS-only min-height plus flex layout change in TSX/PHP to replace top-padding push-down with flex column + mt-auto pattern.

fileChanges.description: Add min-height and flex layout to .post-hero-inner for bottom-aligned content
fileChanges.details: Add rule for `.post-hero-inner` with `min-height: min(700px, 100vh)`, `display: flex`, `flex-direction: column`. This establishes the height constraint and enables bottom alignment.

fileChanges.description: Update content layer to use mt-auto for bottom alignment instead of large top padding
fileChanges.details: On the content layer div (line 145), replace `pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+180px)] sm:pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+280px)]` with `mt-auto pt-[var(--header-height)]` so content sits at the bottom of the min-height container. Keep pb-8 sm:pb-16 for bottom spacing.

fileChanges.description: Sync content layer classes with TSX changes
fileChanges.details: On the content layer div (line 62), apply the same class change: replace `pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+180px)] sm:pt-[calc(var(--header-height)+280px)]` with `mt-auto pt-[var(--header-height)]`. Keep pb-8 sm:pb-16 for bottom spacing.

designDecisions.rationale: Using flex-direction: column on .post-hero-inner with mt-auto on the content layer pushes content to the bottom naturally. The min-height: min(700px, 100vh) ensures the hero is at least 700px tall but never exceeds viewport height. A minimal pt-[var(--header-height)] keeps content from hiding behind the transparent header.
pb-8 sm:pb-16 provides breathing room at the bottom and should remain unchanged.
